_comment: Mutation testing focused on pure business logic. Components are excluded because DOM/D3 mutants are noisy and slow.
_thresholds_comment: high/low color the HTML report. break is null until we have a measured baseline - the first mutation run on main reported 18.35% (see commit ff92aad in CI). Calibrate break per docs/TEST_METRICS.md once the per-layer scores stabilise. Same rationale and follow-up paths as the backend (newBack/stryker.conf.json).
